mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, stable_key, name, allowed_actions, status, revision
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_workspace_role WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY stable_key, id
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_workspace_role SET name = #{name}, allowed_actions = #{allowedActions,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
